name: A080578 — morphic but NOT automatic
description: Notably, this is a morphic sequence that is NOT k-automatic for any k. It is Example 16 in the survey by Allouche, Shallit, and Yassawi (2022) 'How to prove that a sequence is not automatic.' The generating morphism is not primitive (its adjacency matrix restricted to {0,1} is not primitive when y = 1).
